summary: Iter23 — Auth restrictions, IN/INR locale defaults, and Groq→Gemini LLM swap. Backend 10/10 pytest cases pass. Frontend smoke: 4-group sidebar (Home/Grow/Engage/Settings + Admin) renders, all required data-testids present, sidebar freeze verified (bbox unchanged after main-content scroll), AppLayout logout redirects to /login and protects /dashboard, AdminLayout has dark frozen sidebar (rgb(11,17,32)) with working admin-logout, ChatbotWidget produces a high-quality Gemini reply that mentions India (confirms locale default propagates into LLM context).
action_items: All 5 user-requested fixes verified end-to-end. No action items.
Optional: Recommend showing a non-blocking toast on Google/SMS sign-in failure ('No account found, please register first') so users understand the new restriction instead of seeing a generic 403.
Optional (carry-over from iter22): server.py is >7700 lines — split into auth/locale/billing/llm modules for maintainability.
critical_code_review_comments: _groq_chat function name is now misleading since it routes to Gemini via Emergent LLM — rename to _llm_chat to avoid future confusion (server.py ~lines 88-160).
google_callback raises 403 for unknown email but the variable `is_new` is set before the raise — dead code that should be removed (server.py ~614-622).
logout endpoint clears cookies for paths '/' and '/api' which is good, but consider also clearing for the explicit cookie domain if any reverse-proxy rewrites it (server.py ~556-558).
seed_data_creation: Registered ephemeral TEST_iter23_<uuid>@example.com via /api/auth/register to verify default IN/INR locale for newly-registered users. Not cleaned up (preview env, low-value seed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter23 backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iter23_auth_locale_llm.py covers: admin login, logout (with/without token), open registration, restricted Google OAuth (401 on bad session), restricted SMS OTP (403 'No account found' for new phones), default IN/INR locale, Gemini-backed assistant chat, quick-plan generate, content/generate. Use this as regression suite. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY working with gemini-3-flash-preview as of 2026-05-01 — chatbot reply quality is good and respects India context.
